title.en: As a result, he has been in retreat refining th...

content.en:
As the primeval root essence continued to be refined, Ye Tian's heart became stronger and stronger.

"This time, there are more high-grade primeval root essences, and there is really hope that my heart will be tempered to the extreme of the Eight Blood Transformation Realms!" Ye Tian muttered.

As a result, he has been in retreat refining the Superior Ancient Root Essence.

Time flies, and long years have passed.

Ye Tian's heart has been tempered little by little, from 80% of the original tempering.

85%！

90%！

Gradually, Ye Tian tempered his heart to the level of 99.99%, that is, to the extreme of the eight blood transformation realms.

At this time, he had already fallen into a bottleneck, and if he broke the bottleneck, he could break through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

"I can feel the existence of the bottleneck, it doesn't seem to be difficult to break through, it should have something to do with my possession of the Ancient Ancestral Fu, if I copy a few more Ancient Ancestral Fu, maybe I can easily break through the bottleneck and become an Ancient Level Genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

......

Territorial sea boundary seam.

White Shadow Elephant Territory.

On this day, powerful Blood Transformation Realm creatures appeared here, killing living beings when they saw them.

All of a sudden, many Blood Transformation Realm creatures were killed, and resources were robbed.

Even many of the White Shadow Elephants were brutally injured, and one of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm White Shadow Elephants tried to attack them, only to fall and die.

Moonmark was very upset when he heard the news.

"What is the origin of these Blood Transformation Realm creatures?"

Moonmark asked.

A white shadow elephant below said: "Patriarch, these Blood Transformation Realm creatures are a little strange, it seems that their intelligence is not very high, and their breath is different from that of the Blood Transformation Realm creatures in the territorial sea boundary gap, I don't know where they come from?"

"Stand back for now, don't collide with them!"

Moonmark commanded.

There is no way to quit the clan land, because these Blood Transformation Realm creatures are killing everywhere, and they are not opponents, once those Blood Transformation Realm creatures are killed here, they will be finished.

Therefore, they have no choice but to abandon this place.

Whoa!!!

A large number of the White Shadow Elephants were ready to migrate and left their lands.

To the White Shadow Elephant Clan, these newly emerged Blood Transformation Realm creatures were very threatening, but they didn't expect that the more dangerous ones were yet to come.

On the way to migration.

The White Shadow Elephant Clan was shuttling on the road, and suddenly a blood-colored beast appeared in front of them, and its terrifying aura made all the White Shadow Elephants despair.

Rumble!!!

The beast opened its mouth, and the dense white image was swallowed by it.

"Creatures of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm!"

Moonscar was so frightened that he ran away.

The other white shadows are also running away, who cares about the clansmen!

In the blink of an eye, all of the White Shadow Elephants were fleeing, but most of them were still eaten.

Such a scene is being played out in many places, and many Blood Transformation Realm races have suffered heavy losses.

......

Taixuanhai, the territory of the Terrans.

At this time.

Some Blood Transformation Realm creatures also invaded here, but before they entered the Taixuan Sea, they were directly wiped out by Ye Tian.

"How is the aura of these Blood Transformation Realm creatures a bit like the creatures of the Dragon Sea Ruins?"

Ye Tian wondered.

Suddenly, he thought of what the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said, could it be that there was a crack entrance to the ruins of the Dragon Sea, and the creatures there could enter the territorial sea boundary crack?

If this is the case, some weak races and forces will be in trouble.

As for the crisis, it doesn't exist!

The character of the ruins of the dragon sea is not as good as the boundary gap of the territorial waters, they entered the ruins of the dragon sea, and their strength was suppressed very strongly, so they felt that the ruins of the dragon sea were terrible, and they did not dare to easily step into the ruins of the dragon sea if they even had a bone transformation realm.

However, if the creatures of the ruins of the dragon sea enter the boundary gap of the territorial waters, it is not terrible!

Basically, the creatures there came here, there was no threat, and many creatures could only exert the strength of ordinary Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Those creatures that were comparable to the primeval-level geniuses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realms might only be equivalent to the ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realms.

Of course, like the primeval golden monkey he saw at the beginning, with the primeval-level ancestral golden light, its true strength is estimated to have reached the bone transformation realm.

If such an ancient golden monkey enters the boundary gap of territorial waters, it will definitely be a real bone transformation realm.

......

Dark Sea.

Many Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses also received information and determined one thing, that is, the creatures of the Dragon Sea Ruins broke into the boundary gap of the territorial waters.

However, they don't care.

After all, no matter how good the creatures of the Dragon Sea Ruins are, they can't threaten the Dark Sea!

Of course, if the forces under the command of the Dark Sea came to ask for help, they would definitely help.

At the beginning, the creatures of the ruins of the dragon sea did cause a lot of killings, but after many forces in the boundary of the territorial sea reacted, they easily slaughtered these creatures of the ruins of the dragon sea.

But on this day, a creature comparable to nine primordial-level geniuses appeared, killing an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius, shaking the entire territorial sea boundary crack.

The Territorial Sea Boundary Gap didn't want to see such a situation happen, so it sent an ancient-level genius who respected the Nine Blood Transformation Realm to make a move.

Ao Heng, Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, and Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor were all dispatched.

After Ye Tian heard the news, he also prepared to go over to see the excitement.

Somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

Ao Heng Tianzu was the first to encounter the other party, and the two sides fought.

Subsequently, the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor also made a move.

An Ancient-level genius of the Nine-Time Blood Transformation Realm besieged this Nine-Time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius creature.

Now.

Ye Tian stood at a distance and watched.

"It's this creature!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

The creature that was fighting against several Nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval level geniuses was the Grey and White Giant Bear.

At the beginning, he was killed by the gray and white giant bear many times in the ruins of the dragon sea, and finally relied on copying the weak gray and white giant bear to avoid being attacked, thus taking away the flowers that could upgrade the replication talent.

In the ruins of the Dragon Sea, the strength of the gray and white giant bear is comparable to the bone transformation realm.

But in the boundary of the territorial waters, its strength could only be equivalent to the nine blood transformation realm creatures of the primeval-level genius level.

However, the flesh of this gray and white giant bear is indeed terrifying, and the defense is too high, and it is estimated that it has eaten too many resources to enhance its flesh in the ruins of the Dragon Sea.

As a result, it could easily resist the attacks of the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor.

Abrupt.

A figure appeared here, causing the Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor and them to exit one by one.

"Gray and white giant bear, I didn't expect you to run to the crack of our territorial waters, it's just looking for death!" The figure sneered: "When I entered the ruins of the Dragon Sea, you hurt me, but now you will give me death!"

Rumble!!!!

This figure punched out, directly beating the flesh of the gray and white giant bear to crack continuously.

Boom Boom Boom !!

Punch after punch was thrown, and dozens of punches were thrown in a short period of time.

And at this time, the gray and white giant bear has been completely smashed into countless pieces!
